content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T08:58:43.586Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/CLAUDE.md\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/CLAUDE.md\",\"content\":\"# CLAUDE.md\\n\\nThis file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📚 知识库索引\\n\\n完整的代码库知识文档位于 `docs/exploration/`，通过 AI Workflow 深度分析生成：\\n\\n1. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 项目概览](docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md)** - > 生成时间: 2026-06-06  \\n2. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 架构分析](docs/exploration/02-architecture-analysis.md)** - OpenCoreAnalysisKit 采用严格的分层架构设计，共分为 10 个逻辑层次，从底层到�\\n3. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 核心领域知识](docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md)** - 每个 Java 对象的内存布局：\\n4. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 学习路径](docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md)** - 本文档提供了一个结构化的学习路径，帮助你快速上手 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 项目�\\n5. **[知识复用指南：如何让 LLM 参考这些知识沉淀](docs/exploration/05-knowledge-reuse-guide.md)** - 本文档介绍如何让 LLM（Claude、ChatGPT 等）有效利用我们生成的知识文档来辅�\\n6. **[Runtime/Heap/Space 地址定位机制详解](docs/exploration/06-address-location-mechanism.md)** - 这是 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 最核心的技术之一。让我从上到下逐层解释整个地址定�\\n7. **[class 命令实现机制详解](docs/exploration/07-class-command-implementation.md)** - `class` 命令是 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 最常用的功能之一，展示了堆遍历和对象识别�\\n8. **[Space 遍历机制深度解析](docs/exploration/08-space-walking-mechanism.md)** - 1. **如何遍历各个 Space？** 是通过遍历 VMA 地址段吗？\\n9. **[LiveBitmap 存放位置确定机制详解](docs/exploration/09-livebitmap-storage-location.md)** - 这是一个非常深入的问题，涉及 ART GC 的内存管理核心机制。\\n10. **[sysroot 命令机制详解](docs/exploration/10-sysroot-command-mechanism.md)** - sysroot 命令如何将本地文件映射到 coredump 的内存空间，实现符号解析和 DEX 文件分析。\\n\\n\\n**使用建议**：\\n- 开发新功能前，先查阅相关章节\\n- 遇到问题时，参考 03-domain-knowledge.md 和学习路径\\n- Code Review 时，对照核心设计约束（见下文）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## ⚠️ 核心设计约束（必须遵守）\\n\\n### 1. ART 对象访问规范\\n\\n```cpp\\n// ✅ 正确：使用封装的访问方法\\nClass klass = obj.GetClass();  // 自动解压缩 32 位引用\\nString name = klass.GetName(); // 复用 LoadBlock 缓存\\n\\n// ❌ 错误：不要直接操作内部字段\\nuint32_t raw_klass = obj.klass_;           // 跳过了解压缩逻辑\\nconst char* raw_name = (char*)klass.name_; // 可能访问无效地址\\n```\\n\\n**原因**：\\n- `klass_` 是 32 位压缩引用，需要通过 HeapReference 解压\\n- 直接访问字段会跳过 MemoryRef 的地址映射和缓存优化\\n\\n### 2. 版本适配模式（强制）\\n\\n**所有涉及 ART 内部结构的代码必须检查 SDK 版本**：\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 字段遍历适配\\nif (Android::Sdk() >= __ANDROID_API_W__) {\\n    // SDK 36+: 字段统一存储\\n    ArtField* fields = clazz.GetFields();\\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < clazz.NumFields(); i++) {\\n        if (!fields[i].IsStatic()) {\\n            // 处理实例字段\\n        }\\n    }\\n} else {\\n    // SDK < 36: 字段分离存储\\n    ArtField* ifields = clazz.GetIFields();\\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < clazz.NumInstanceFields(); i++) {\\n        // 处理实例字段\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// 方法遍历适配\\nif (Android::Sdk() >= __ANDROID_API_N__) {\\n    // SDK 24+: 方法统一存储\\n    ArtMethod* methods = clazz.GetMethods();\\n    uint32_t num_direct = clazz.NumDirectMethods();\\n    // direct: [0, num_direct), virtual: [num_direct, NumMethods())\\n} else {\\n    // SDK < 24: 方法分离存储\\n    ArtMethod* direct_methods = clazz.GetDirectMethods();\\n    ArtMethod* virtual_methods = clazz.GetVirtualMethods();\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**关键版本变化**：\\n- SDK 24 (N): 统一 methods 数组\\n- SDK 26 (O): String 压缩、ext_data_ 字段\\n- SDK 36 (W): 统一 fields 数组\\n\\n### 3. 内存访问安全（强制）\\n\\n**所有堆遍历必须捕获异常**：\\n\\n```cpp\\ntry {\\n    Android::ForeachObjects([](Object& obj) {\\n        // 验证对象有效性\\n        if (!obj.IsValid()) return true;\\n        \\n        // 跳过 Class 对象本身（如果需要）\\n        if (obj.IsClass()) return true;\\n        \\n        // 处理对象...\\n        return true;  // 继续遍历\\n    }, EACH_APP_OBJECTS);\\n} catch (InvalidAddressException& e) {\\n    LOGW(\\\"Heap walking interrupted: %s\\\", e.what());\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**原因**：\\n- coredump 可能包含损坏的对象\\n- 单个对象失败不应影响整体遍历\\n\\n### 4. 命令开发规范\\n\\n**新命令的标准实现模式**：\\n\\n```cpp\\nclass MyCommand : public Command {\\npublic:\\n    int prepare(int argc, char* const argv[]) override {\\n        // 1. 前置检查\\n        if (!CoreApi::IsReady() || !Android::IsSdkReady())\\n            return Command::FINISH;\\n        \\n        // 2. 解析参数（使用 getopt_long）\\n        // 3. 初始化选项\\n        // 4. 准备 Android 运行时\\n        Android::Prepare();\\n        \\n        // 5. 在子进程执行（避免崩溃影响主进程）\\n        return Command::ONCHLD;\\n    }\\n    \\n    int main(int argc, char* const argv[]) override {\\n        // 核心逻辑\\n        // 使用 try-catch 保护\\n        return 0;\\n    }\\n    \\n    void usage() override {\\n        // 打印帮助信息\\n    }\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**要点**：\\n- 返回 `ONCHLD` 在子进程执行（堆遍历等危险操作）\\n- 异常安全：捕获 `InvalidAddressException`\\n- 参考 `cmd_class.cpp` / `cmd_space.cpp` 的实现模式\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 🔍 快速参考\\n\\n### ART 对象内存布局\\n\\n```\\nObject 对象头（8 字节）：\\n+0x00: uint32_t klass_    (32位压缩引用 → Class)\\n+0x04: uint32_t monitor_  (锁字)\\n+0x08: [实例字段数据...]\\n\\n所有对象 8 字节对齐 (kObjectAlignment = 8)\\n```\\n\\n### String 对象（SDK 26+）\\n\\n```\\n+0x00: klass_     (继承自 Object)\\n+0x04: monitor_   (继承自 Object)\\n+0x08: count_     (低1位=压缩标志, 高31位=长度)\\n+0x0C: hash_code_ (缓存的哈希值)\\n+0x10: char[]     (内联字符数据)\\n\\ncount_ 编码：\\n- count_ & 0x1 == 0: Latin-1 (1字节/字符)\\n- count_ & 0x1 == 1: UTF-16 (2字节/字符)\\n- 实际长度: count_ >> 1\\n```\\n\\n### HeapReference 压缩机制\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 所有对象引用都是 32 位，即使在 64 位平台\\nuint32_t compressed_ref = obj.klass();\\n\\n// 解压缩通过 MemoryRef 自动处理\\nClass klass = obj.GetClass();  // 内部调用解压缩逻辑\\n```\\n\\n### 堆空间类型\\n\\n| Type | 名称 | 用途 |\\n|------|------|------|\\n| 0 | ImageSpace | boot.art 系统类 |\\n| 1 | ZygoteSpace | Zygote 共享对象 |\\n| 5 | RegionSpace | 应用主堆 |\\n| 6 | MallocSpace | malloc 分配 |\\n| 7 | LargeObjectSpace | 大对象（>12KB）|\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Project Overview\\n\\nOpenCoreAnalysisKit is a C++ tool for analyzing Android coredumps and tombstones. It parses ELF core files and provides commands to inspect Java heap objects, ART runtime state, threads, and memory regions. The primary binary is `core-parser`.\\n\\n**探索统计**（2026-06-06）：559 文件、10 层架构、8 个业务领域、深度分析 10 个核心文件\\n\\n## Build Commands\\n\\n```bash\\n# Ubuntu\\n./script/build.sh\\n\\n# MacOS\\n./script/build_macos.sh\\n\\n# Android NDK\\nexport ANDROID_NDK_HOME=<NDK_DIR>\\n./script/build_android.sh\\n\\n# Optional: Debug build\\nexport BUILD_TYPE=\\\"Debug\\\"\\n./script/build.sh\\n```\\n\\nOutput binaries go to `output/aosp/<debug|release>/<platform>/bin/core-parser`.\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n```\\nOpenCoreAnalysisKit/\\n├── parser/              # Main C++ implementation\\n│   ├── core_parser.cpp # Entry point, CLI parsing, command registration\\n│   ├── command/        # All REPL commands (class, space, thread, etc.)\\n│   ├── daemon/         # HTTP and MCP server modes\\n│   └── ui/             # UI thread handling\\n├── android/            # Android ART runtime mirroring (AOSP mirror)\\n│   ├── android.cpp/h   # Android version detection, basic types\\n│   ├── art/            # ART object model mirroring\\n│   │   ├── dex/        # DEX file format parsing\\n│   │   └── runtime/    # Runtime, mirror::Class, ArtMethod, etc.\\n│   └── ...\\n├── 3rd-party/          # capstone, xz-utils, zstd (git submodules)\\n└── script/             # Build scripts\\n```\\n\\n## Key Concepts\\n\\n- **core-parser**: The main executable; loads coredump files via `-c <file>`, `-p <pid>`, or `-t <tombstone>`\\n- **ART Runtime mirroring**: `android/art/runtime/mirror/*.h` mirrors AOSP's `art/runtime/mirror/` for object layout access\\n- **Command system**: Commands are C++ classes registered via `CommandManager`. Run `help` in the REPL to see all commands.\\n- **Heap walking**: `space` command iterates Java heap regions; `top` shows object statistics; `class` searches for class instances\\n- **MCP mode**: Run `core-parser --mcp` for AI assistant integration via stdio\\n- **HTTP mode**: Run `core-parser --http [ip:port]` for REST API server\\n\\n## CLI Usage\\n\\n```bash\\ncore-parser -c <corfile>           # Load from coredump file\\ncore-parser -p <pid> -m arm64      # Attach to live process (Linux only)\\ncore-parser -t <tombstone>         # Load from tombstone file\\ncore-parser --sdk 34               # Force Android SDK version\\ncore-parser --sysroot <dir>        # Symbol sysroot path\\n```\\n\\n## Important Notes\\n\\n- HeapReference fields in ART objects are always 4 bytes (32-bit compressed refs) even on 64-bit hosts\\n- String data is inline at `obj+16`, not a pointer — UTF-16 if bit 0 of count is set, Latin-1 otherwise\\n- Class names use descriptor format (`Ljava/lang/String;`) in ART internals\\n- The project uses git submodules — run `git submodule update --init --recursive` after clone\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📖 开发者实践指南\\n\\n### 新手入门路径\\n\\n1. 阅读 `docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md` 了解项目全貌\\n2. 按照 `docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md` 的 6 步路径学习（预计 2-3 天）\\n3. 参考现有命令实现（`cmd_class.cpp`, `cmd_space.cpp`）开发新功能\\n\\n### 常见任务快速参考\\n\\n| 任务 | 参考文档 | 关键文件 |\\n|------|---------|---------|\\n| 实现新命令 | 04-learning-path.md Step 3 | cmd_class.cpp |\\n| 处理版本兼容 | 03-domain-knowledge.md 第2章 | android.cpp, runtime.cpp |\\n| 遍历堆对象 | 07-class-command-implementation.md | android.cpp::ForeachObjects |\\n| 定位 Runtime | 06-address-location-mechanism.md | runtime.cpp::Current() |\\n| 理解对象布局 | 03-domain-knowledge.md 第1章 | mirror/object.h |\\n\\n### Code Review 检查清单\\n\\n- [ ] 是否检查了 SDK 版本（涉及 ART 内部结构时）\\n- [ ] 是否使用封装方法访问对象字段（而非直接访问）\\n- [ ] 堆遍历是否有 try-catch 保护\\n- [ ] 命令是否返回 ONCHLD（危险操作）\\n- [ ] 是否复用 LoadBlock 缓存（调用 copyRef）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 🚀 进阶主题\\n\\n### 调试技巧\\n\\n```bash\\n# 启用详细日志\\ncore-parser -c core.dump -d 2\\n\\n# 查看内存映射\\ncore-parser> linkmap\\n\\n# 验证 Runtime 地址\\ncore-parser> symbol libart _ZN3art7Runtime9instance_E\\n\\n# 检查堆布局\\ncore-parser> space\\n```\\n\\n### 性能优化要点\\n\\n- 使用 `QUICK_CACHE` 宏避免重复查找\\n- 复用 LoadBlock：`obj2.copyRef(obj1)`\\n- 早期过滤：在 `IsValid()` 后立即判断类型\\n- 批量操作：使用 `ForeachObjects` 而非逐个查找\\n\\n### 扩展开发\\n\\n- **HTTP API**: 参考 `parser/daemon/http/` 实现 REST 接口\\n- **MCP 集成**: 参考 `parser/daemon/mcp/` 实现 AI 助手协议\\n- **插件系统**: 参考 `plugin/simple/` 开发外部命令\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📞 获取帮助\\n\\n- **问题排查**: 查看 `docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md` 第九章\\\"最佳实践\\\"\\n- **学习资源**: 按照 `docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md` 系统学习\\n\",\"numLines\":341,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":341}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Return either one or more <observation>...</observation> blocks, or an empty response if this tool use should be skipped.
Concrete debugging findings from logs, queue state, database rows, session routing, or code-path inspection count as durable discoveries and should be recorded.
Never reply with prose such as "Skipping", "No substantive tool executions", or any explanation outside XML. Non-XML text is discarded.

All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T08:58:43.586Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/CLAUDE.md\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/CLAUDE.md\",\"content\":\"# CLAUDE.md\\n\\nThis file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📚 知识库索引\\n\\n完整的代码库知识文档位于 `docs/exploration/`，通过 AI Workflow 深度分析生成：\\n\\n1. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 项目概览](docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md)** - > 生成时间: 2026-06-06  \\n2. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 架构分析](docs/exploration/02-architecture-analysis.md)** - OpenCoreAnalysisKit 采用严格的分层架构设计，共分为 10 个逻辑层次，从底层到�\\n3. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 核心领域知识](docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md)** - 每个 Java 对象的内存布局：\\n4. **[OpenCoreAnalysisKit 学习路径](docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md)** - 本文档提供了一个结构化的学习路径，帮助你快速上手 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 项目�\\n5. **[知识复用指南：如何让 LLM 参考这些知识沉淀](docs/exploration/05-knowledge-reuse-guide.md)** - 本文档介绍如何让 LLM（Claude、ChatGPT 等）有效利用我们生成的知识文档来辅�\\n6. **[Runtime/Heap/Space 地址定位机制详解](docs/exploration/06-address-location-mechanism.md)** - 这是 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 最核心的技术之一。让我从上到下逐层解释整个地址定�\\n7. **[class 命令实现机制详解](docs/exploration/07-class-command-implementation.md)** - `class` 命令是 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 最常用的功能之一，展示了堆遍历和对象识别�\\n8. **[Space 遍历机制深度解析](docs/exploration/08-space-walking-mechanism.md)** - 1. **如何遍历各个 Space？** 是通过遍历 VMA 地址段吗？\\n9. **[LiveBitmap 存放位置确定机制详解](docs/exploration/09-livebitmap-storage-location.md)** - 这是一个非常深入的问题，涉及 ART GC 的内存管理核心机制。\\n10. **[sysroot 命令机制详解](docs/exploration/10-sysroot-command-mechanism.md)** - sysroot 命令如何将本地文件映射到 coredump 的内存空间，实现符号解析和 DEX 文件分析。\\n\\n\\n**使用建议**：\\n- 开发新功能前，先查阅相关章节\\n- 遇到问题时，参考 03-domain-knowledge.md 和学习路径\\n- Code Review 时，对照核心设计约束（见下文）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## ⚠️ 核心设计约束（必须遵守）\\n\\n### 1. ART 对象访问规范\\n\\n```cpp\\n// ✅ 正确：使用封装的访问方法\\nClass klass = obj.GetClass();  // 自动解压缩 32 位引用\\nString name = klass.GetName(); // 复用 LoadBlock 缓存\\n\\n// ❌ 错误：不要直接操作内部字段\\nuint32_t raw_klass = obj.klass_;           // 跳过了解压缩逻辑\\nconst char* raw_name = (char*)klass.name_; // 可能访问无效地址\\n```\\n\\n**原因**：\\n- `klass_` 是 32 位压缩引用，需要通过 HeapReference 解压\\n- 直接访问字段会跳过 MemoryRef 的地址映射和缓存优化\\n\\n### 2. 版本适配模式（强制）\\n\\n**所有涉及 ART 内部结构的代码必须检查 SDK 版本**：\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 字段遍历适配\\nif (Android::Sdk() >= __ANDROID_API_W__) {\\n    // SDK 36+: 字段统一存储\\n    ArtField* fields = clazz.GetFields();\\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < clazz.NumFields(); i++) {\\n        if (!fields[i].IsStatic()) {\\n            // 处理实例字段\\n        }\\n    }\\n} else {\\n    // SDK < 36: 字段分离存储\\n    ArtField* ifields = clazz.GetIFields();\\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < clazz.NumInstanceFields(); i++) {\\n        // 处理实例字段\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// 方法遍历适配\\nif (Android::Sdk() >= __ANDROID_API_N__) {\\n    // SDK 24+: 方法统一存储\\n    ArtMethod* methods = clazz.GetMethods();\\n    uint32_t num_direct = clazz.NumDirectMethods();\\n    // direct: [0, num_direct), virtual: [num_direct, NumMethods())\\n} else {\\n    // SDK < 24: 方法分离存储\\n    ArtMethod* direct_methods = clazz.GetDirectMethods();\\n    ArtMethod* virtual_methods = clazz.GetVirtualMethods();\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**关键版本变化**：\\n- SDK 24 (N): 统一 methods 数组\\n- SDK 26 (O): String 压缩、ext_data_ 字段\\n- SDK 36 (W): 统一 fields 数组\\n\\n### 3. 内存访问安全（强制）\\n\\n**所有堆遍历必须捕获异常**：\\n\\n```cpp\\ntry {\\n    Android::ForeachObjects([](Object& obj) {\\n        // 验证对象有效性\\n        if (!obj.IsValid()) return true;\\n        \\n        // 跳过 Class 对象本身（如果需要）\\n        if (obj.IsClass()) return true;\\n        \\n        // 处理对象...\\n        return true;  // 继续遍历\\n    }, EACH_APP_OBJECTS);\\n} catch (InvalidAddressException& e) {\\n    LOGW(\\\"Heap walking interrupted: %s\\\", e.what());\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**原因**：\\n- coredump 可能包含损坏的对象\\n- 单个对象失败不应影响整体遍历\\n\\n### 4. 命令开发规范\\n\\n**新命令的标准实现模式**：\\n\\n```cpp\\nclass MyCommand : public Command {\\npublic:\\n    int prepare(int argc, char* const argv[]) override {\\n        // 1. 前置检查\\n        if (!CoreApi::IsReady() || !Android::IsSdkReady())\\n            return Command::FINISH;\\n        \\n        // 2. 解析参数（使用 getopt_long）\\n        // 3. 初始化选项\\n        // 4. 准备 Android 运行时\\n        Android::Prepare();\\n        \\n        // 5. 在子进程执行（避免崩溃影响主进程）\\n        return Command::ONCHLD;\\n    }\\n    \\n    int main(int argc, char* const argv[]) override {\\n        // 核心逻辑\\n        // 使用 try-catch 保护\\n        return 0;\\n    }\\n    \\n    void usage() override {\\n        // 打印帮助信息\\n    }\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**要点**：\\n- 返回 `ONCHLD` 在子进程执行（堆遍历等危险操作）\\n- 异常安全：捕获 `InvalidAddressException`\\n- 参考 `cmd_class.cpp` / `cmd_space.cpp` 的实现模式\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 🔍 快速参考\\n\\n### ART 对象内存布局\\n\\n```\\nObject 对象头（8 字节）：\\n+0x00: uint32_t klass_    (32位压缩引用 → Class)\\n+0x04: uint32_t monitor_  (锁字)\\n+0x08: [实例字段数据...]\\n\\n所有对象 8 字节对齐 (kObjectAlignment = 8)\\n```\\n\\n### String 对象（SDK 26+）\\n\\n```\\n+0x00: klass_     (继承自 Object)\\n+0x04: monitor_   (继承自 Object)\\n+0x08: count_     (低1位=压缩标志, 高31位=长度)\\n+0x0C: hash_code_ (缓存的哈希值)\\n+0x10: char[]     (内联字符数据)\\n\\ncount_ 编码：\\n- count_ & 0x1 == 0: Latin-1 (1字节/字符)\\n- count_ & 0x1 == 1: UTF-16 (2字节/字符)\\n- 实际长度: count_ >> 1\\n```\\n\\n### HeapReference 压缩机制\\n\\n```cpp\\n// 所有对象引用都是 32 位，即使在 64 位平台\\nuint32_t compressed_ref = obj.klass();\\n\\n// 解压缩通过 MemoryRef 自动处理\\nClass klass = obj.GetClass();  // 内部调用解压缩逻辑\\n```\\n\\n### 堆空间类型\\n\\n| Type | 名称 | 用途 |\\n|------|------|------|\\n| 0 | ImageSpace | boot.art 系统类 |\\n| 1 | ZygoteSpace | Zygote 共享对象 |\\n| 5 | RegionSpace | 应用主堆 |\\n| 6 | MallocSpace | malloc 分配 |\\n| 7 | LargeObjectSpace | 大对象（>12KB）|\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Project Overview\\n\\nOpenCoreAnalysisKit is a C++ tool for analyzing Android coredumps and tombstones. It parses ELF core files and provides commands to inspect Java heap objects, ART runtime state, threads, and memory regions. The primary binary is `core-parser`.\\n\\n**探索统计**（2026-06-06）：559 文件、10 层架构、8 个业务领域、深度分析 10 个核心文件\\n\\n## Build Commands\\n\\n```bash\\n# Ubuntu\\n./script/build.sh\\n\\n# MacOS\\n./script/build_macos.sh\\n\\n# Android NDK\\nexport ANDROID_NDK_HOME=<NDK_DIR>\\n./script/build_android.sh\\n\\n# Optional: Debug build\\nexport BUILD_TYPE=\\\"Debug\\\"\\n./script/build.sh\\n```\\n\\nOutput binaries go to `output/aosp/<debug|release>/<platform>/bin/core-parser`.\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n```\\nOpenCoreAnalysisKit/\\n├── parser/              # Main C++ implementation\\n│   ├── core_parser.cpp # Entry point, CLI parsing, command registration\\n│   ├── command/        # All REPL commands (class, space, thread, etc.)\\n│   ├── daemon/         # HTTP and MCP server modes\\n│   └── ui/             # UI thread handling\\n├── android/            # Android ART runtime mirroring (AOSP mirror)\\n│   ├── android.cpp/h   # Android version detection, basic types\\n│   ├── art/            # ART object model mirroring\\n│   │   ├── dex/        # DEX file format parsing\\n│   │   └── runtime/    # Runtime, mirror::Class, ArtMethod, etc.\\n│   └── ...\\n├── 3rd-party/          # capstone, xz-utils, zstd (git submodules)\\n└── script/             # Build scripts\\n```\\n\\n## Key Concepts\\n\\n- **core-parser**: The main executable; loads coredump files via `-c <file>`, `-p <pid>`, or `-t <tombstone>`\\n- **ART Runtime mirroring**: `android/art/runtime/mirror/*.h` mirrors AOSP's `art/runtime/mirror/` for object layout access\\n- **Command system**: Commands are C++ classes registered via `CommandManager`. Run `help` in the REPL to see all commands.\\n- **Heap walking**: `space` command iterates Java heap regions; `top` shows object statistics; `class` searches for class instances\\n- **MCP mode**: Run `core-parser --mcp` for AI assistant integration via stdio\\n- **HTTP mode**: Run `core-parser --http [ip:port]` for REST API server\\n\\n## CLI Usage\\n\\n```bash\\ncore-parser -c <corfile>           # Load from coredump file\\ncore-parser -p <pid> -m arm64      # Attach to live process (Linux only)\\ncore-parser -t <tombstone>         # Load from tombstone file\\ncore-parser --sdk 34               # Force Android SDK version\\ncore-parser --sysroot <dir>        # Symbol sysroot path\\n```\\n\\n## Important Notes\\n\\n- HeapReference fields in ART objects are always 4 bytes (32-bit compressed refs) even on 64-bit hosts\\n- String data is inline at `obj+16`, not a pointer — UTF-16 if bit 0 of count is set, Latin-1 otherwise\\n- Class names use descriptor format (`Ljava/lang/String;`) in ART internals\\n- The project uses git submodules — run `git submodule update --init --recursive` after clone\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📖 开发者实践指南\\n\\n### 新手入门路径\\n\\n1. 阅读 `docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md` 了解项目全貌\\n2. 按照 `docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md` 的 6 步路径学习（预计 2-3 天）\\n3. 参考现有命令实现（`cmd_class.cpp`, `cmd_space.cpp`）开发新功能\\n\\n### 常见任务快速参考\\n\\n| 任务 | 参考文档 | 关键文件 |\\n|------|---------|---------|\\n| 实现新命令 | 04-learning-path.md Step 3 | cmd_class.cpp |\\n| 处理版本兼容 | 03-domain-knowledge.md 第2章 | android.cpp, runtime.cpp |\\n| 遍历堆对象 | 07-class-command-implementation.md | android.cpp::ForeachObjects |\\n| 定位 Runtime | 06-address-location-mechanism.md | runtime.cpp::Current() |\\n| 理解对象布局 | 03-domain-knowledge.md 第1章 | mirror/object.h |\\n\\n### Code Review 检查清单\\n\\n- [ ] 是否检查了 SDK 版本（涉及 ART 内部结构时）\\n- [ ] 是否使用封装方法访问对象字段（而非直接访问）\\n- [ ] 堆遍历是否有 try-catch 保护\\n- [ ] 命令是否返回 ONCHLD（危险操作）\\n- [ ] 是否复用 LoadBlock 缓存（调用 copyRef）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 🚀 进阶主题\\n\\n### 调试技巧\\n\\n```bash\\n# 启用详细日志\\ncore-parser -c core.dump -d 2\\n\\n# 查看内存映射\\ncore-parser> linkmap\\n\\n# 验证 Runtime 地址\\ncore-parser> symbol libart _ZN3art7Runtime9instance_E\\n\\n# 检查堆布局\\ncore-parser> space\\n```\\n\\n### 性能优化要点\\n\\n- 使用 `QUICK_CACHE` 宏避免重复查找\\n- 复用 LoadBlock：`obj2.copyRef(obj1)`\\n- 早期过滤：在 `IsValid()` 后立即判断类型\\n- 批量操作：使用 `ForeachObjects` 而非逐个查找\\n\\n### 扩展开发\\n\\n- **HTTP API**: 参考 `parser/daemon/http/` 实现 REST 接口\\n- **MCP 集成**: 参考 `parser/daemon/mcp/` 实现 AI 助手协议\\n- **插件系统**: 参考 `plugin/simple/` 开发外部命令\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 📞 获取帮助\\n\\n- **问题排查**: 查看 `docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md` 第九章\\\"最佳实践\\\"\\n- **学习资源**: 按照 `docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md` 系统学习\\n\",\"numLines\":341,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":341}}"</outcome>
